description.value: Aura strong necromancy; CL 17th; Weight 4 lbs.; Price 25,715 gp DESCRIPTION This black iron +2 longsword bestows a negative level when it deals a critical hit. The sword wielder gains 1d6 temporary hit points each time a negative level is bestowed on another. These temporary hit points last for 24 hours. One day after being struck, subjects must succeed at a DC 16 Fortitude save for each negative level gained or any such levels become permanent. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells enervation; Cost 13,015 gp
